title: Convalytics MCP connection
description: Read-only analytics queries for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and other MCP-capable clients. Requires a Convalytics API token and a Solo or Pro plan.

apiKey.title: Convalytics API token
apiKey.description: Create one at https://convalytics.dev/tokens. The MCP endpoint requires the Solo ($29/mo) or Pro ($99/mo) plan.
